title: web backend: static-token+cookie auth (silent-404), switcher API, Tier 2 WS relay
action: axum web layer. auth.rs: POST /api/login (constant-time compare vs HERDCTL_WEB_SECRET, on match issue random session id httpOnly SameSite=Strict cookie; wrong/absent auth to protected routes → opaque 404 no-leak per airemote D46/D56). api.rs: GET /api/agents (auth) returns switcher list flattened from snapshot [{workspace,tab,pane_id,display,kind,status}]; GET /api/health returns {version,protocol,herdr_up}. relay.rs: GET /ws/terminal?pane=<id>&mode=observe|control (auth via cookie) bridges xterm.js<->HerdrStream — server->client frames JSON, client->server ControlMessage; hybrid rotate (observe=observer resize, control=controller resize per 82eff9f7); raw EOF ends WS like closed. mod.rs: AppState (Arc<dyn HerdrControl>, Arc<dyn HerdrStream>, session set, config), router, serve static /static SPA.

truths: unauth request to protected route returns opaque 404 (no leak)
WS relay round-trips frames both directions
prohibitions: No leaking app existence on unauth (no descriptive 401)
Relay must use HerdrStream only, not HerdrControl
No redaction of Tier 2 raw stream

verify: cargo test --quiet web && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings

trace.outcome: Web layer complete: static-token+cookie auth with opaque-404 no-leak on any unauth access, constant-time compare, httpOnly+SameSite cookie; switcher API flattening snapshot to agent rows; health probe; Tier 2 WS relay bridging xterm.js<->HerdrStream (transparent pipe, HerdrStream-only per da82b90f, hybrid rotate). e2e proves full round-trip over a real WebSocket. Committed 7c1e03f.
trace.verification_evidence:
60 tests pass (9 web unit + 2 e2e + 49 prior), clippy -D warnings clean. Key:
- unauth_agents_returns_opaque_404, wrong_token_login_is_opaque_404
- correct_token_sets_cookie_and_grants_access (HttpOnly, SameSite=Strict)
- agents_lists_all_seeded_panes (4, statuses working/blocked/done/idle)
- tier2_control_round_trips_over_real_websocket (full frame first, typed input echoed as diff)
- unauthenticated_ws_is_refused
trace.verify_output: 9 web unit + 2 e2e pass; unauth opaque-404, constant-time login, httpOnly+SameSite cookie, agents 4 panes, health proto 16; e2e relay full-frame+echo over real WS; clippy clean; 60 tests total
trace.verify_command: cargo test web && cargo test --test tier2_relay_e2e && cargo clippy -- -D warnings
